literal_description: Single-module 20ft NuGen Casita prefab home. Black powder-coated steel I-beam frame at corners and roof edge. Mixed cladding: warm cedar-tone vertical wood panels in center section flanking large glass French doors, white flat panels on both end modules. Matte black flat roof. Two aluminum-framed windows on the end panels. Small timber entry deck with three steps leading to glass double doors. Concrete stepping stone path leads from foreground to the deck. Lush tropical setting: two large mature palm trees (one each side), dense ornamental shrubs at the base of the structure. Bright blue sky, midday tropical sun.
environment: Tropical suburban — Florida/California aesthetic. Lush green lawn, mature palms, clean concrete path, residential neighborhood feel.
visual_style: Modern industrial prefab. Black steel frame contrasts warm cedar cladding and crisp white panels. Glass-forward center facade. Clean lines, minimal ornamentation.
lighting: Midday sun, slightly overhead and from right. Bright, high contrast. Deep shadows under roof overhang and entry deck. Sky is clear blue.
atmosphere: Turnkey tropical retreat. Compact, self-contained, move-in ready. The kind of unit you put on a corner lot or backyard ADU and immediately have a lifestyle upgrade.
landscape_features: Lush green lawn, two large mature palm trees, low ornamental tropical shrubs along the foundation, concrete stepping stone path, residential suburban surroundings with trees in background.
suggested_sfx_ambience: Warm tropical breeze through palm fronds, distant birdsong (subtropical birds), light neighborhood ambience — distant lawnmower, a car passing. Calm, residential, sunny.
